title: taraxacum acutangulum
intro: Taraxacum acutangulum, commonly known as the sharp-leaved dandelion or sharp-toothed dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves, roots, and flowers, which are said to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum acutangulum include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its use in reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum acutangulum can be found in tea, tincture, and capsule form, with some traditional practitioners using it as a diuretic or to support skin health.
